title: Profiling CPU efficiency for a completed ensemble run
query_text: I ran an ensemble of 16 climate model variants (job 902117). Aggregate the per-variant CPU efficiency metrics and identify which variant had the lowest efficiency and the likely cause.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Job 902117 shows CPU efficiency of 71% with a bottleneck in the I/O phase (hours 7-10) caused by thermal-induced frequency reduction on node03. All ensemble variants share this node, so the slowest variant is whichever ran during peak thermal degradation (2026-02-12T02:00-06:00Z).
